steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The sentence sets up a contrast with but in fact: while sculpture is sometimes characterized as idealizing subjects, many actually depict people in some opposite way. We need a word meaning the opposite of idealizing.

steps.title: Pick the antonym of "idealizing"
steps.content:
A (implausible) means unrealistic — but idealized art is also unrealistic, so this isn't an opposite. C (superficial) and D (imprecise) don't oppose idealization either.

B (unflattering) is the direct opposite of idealizing — depicting subjects as less than perfect. B is correct.
